_comment: Parameterized config for the Verified Monitoring (N1) synthetic survey. survey_sim.py generates per-round, row-level household records (each round = its own opp; a 'primary' research form + a 'back_check' form) and computes every dashboard KPI from those rows via commcare_connect.labs.survey_quality. Numbers below are GENERATION TARGETS — the displayed KPIs are computed from the generated records, so they land near these with sampling noise. Tune this file to recreate the dashboard for a different program/geography.
_geography_comment: Kaura (program) and Manchok (comparison) are REAL adjacent wards in Kaura LGA, Kaduna State, Nigeria, sourced from the labs admin-boundary backend. Survey + service-delivery points are sampled INSIDE these real polygons.
_self_report_comment: Program self-report = verified coverage * inflation (the program over-reports), interpolated start->end across rounds, with +/- noise so the self-reported line jitters round-to-round and sits above the verified line. R6: ~0.681*1.29 -> ~88%.
_backcheck_comment: A stratified sample (every enumerator covered) is re-surveyed by a different (BC) enumerator. outcome_agreement drives the vitamin-A match rate (the 'back-check pass' headline); type1_agreement drives discordance on stable identifiers (sex/age/present). Front-loaded to 20% in the first rounds per J-PAL/DIME guidance.
